name: imperium-brain-marketplace
description: The Ultimate Startup OS for Claude Code — 18 skills, 8 agents, 20 commands covering startup ops, competitive research, and content creation

plugins.name: imperium-brain
plugins.description: Complete startup operating system: 9 startup advisor skills (CEO, CTO, Product, Marketing, Sales, Finance, Founder, Legal, Engineering) + deep competitive research with imperium-crawl integration + LinkedIn viral posts + PPTX carousels + HTML slides + brand identity system + SOPs/runbooks + video bridge to Remotion + hidden API discovery. 18 skills, 8 agents, 20 commands, 2,019 RAG chunks. Use when the user mentions anything related to startups, strategy, fundraising, marketing, sales, product, finance, engineering, competitive research, LinkedIn, carousels, brand, presentations, SOPs, or any business topic.
